positive: A central, intricate illustration of a mystical forest scene at night. The composition should feature clean, stylized silhouettes of ancient trees and bioluminescent fauna, creating a deep, symmetrical, mandala-like pattern suitable for an apparel repeat print. Use strong contrast between deep indigo and black backgrounds and highly luminous neon teal, electric blue, and gold accents for glowing elements. The style should be a fusion of detailed etching art and vibrant bioluminescent fantasy illustration, utilizing crisp linework and flat color blocking. The lighting must be dramatic and ethereal, emphasizing the glowing contours of the flora. Minimalist yet rich detail, high contrast, symmetrical composition, perfect for merchandise art.
